user.description: Sign in with the username and password you use at myaccount.lvvwd.com. Your credentials are validated with a real login before the account is added.

data_description.password: Your LVVWD My Account password. It is stored locally and only sent to the LVVWD portal.

reauth_confirm.description: The LVVWD portal rejected the saved password for {username}. Enter the current password to reconnect.

data_description.password: The new password is validated with a real login before being saved.

reconfigure.description: Update the password used to sign in to LVVWD My Account as {username}.

data_description.password: The new password is validated with a real login before being saved.

abort.already_configured: This LVVWD account is already configured

init.title: LVVWD options
init.description: Cost modeling reconstructs your LVVWD statement from daily usage. The meter size is only used when cost modeling is enabled.

data_description.meter_size: Your water meter size, printed on your statement. Most homes are 0.625". Affects only the service and SNWA infrastructure day-charges.
data_description.enable_cost: When enabled, an additional cost statistic (USD) is written alongside usage.

invalid_auth.message: The LVVWD portal rejected the saved username or password

scrape_failed.message: Error reading usage from the LVVWD portal: {error}
